title: taraxacum abruptilobum
intro: Taraxacum abruptilobum, also known as the abrupt-lobed dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus Taraxacum. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been used to treat various health conditions due to their diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum abruptilobum include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting the liver and kidneys, making it a popular herbal remedy for conditions like edema, eczema, and liver disease. Taraxacum abruptilobum can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to the skin.
